commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a built-in Tenki Linux SSH-lease provider with config/env/flags, provider registration, docs, tests, shared SSH certificate/proxy support, and a Tenki-specific AGENTS note.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The PR body provides live Tenki output and the branch adds source-level tests instead of a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; maintainers need to decide whether to accept Tenki as a built-in provider and review the shared SSH compatibility surface.

target.title: feat(provider): add Tenki sandbox provider
target.body:
## Summary

- add `provider=tenki` as a direct Linux SSH-lease provider backed by the Tenki CLI
- provision Tenki sandbox sessions with Crabbox metadata/tags, then connect through Tenki-managed SSH key/cert material and `tenki sandbox ssh-proxy`
- support warmup, run, ssh, status/list, stop, config/env/flags, sizing, image/snapshot selection, and provider docs
- keep Tenki sandbox lifecycle provider-local: no broker support, no desktop/browser/code/Tailscale, and no direct guest IP exposure
- preserve per-session TTL/idle metadata for status/list so reused commands do not rewrite lease timing with local defaults

## Verification

- `go test ./internal/providers/tenki ./internal/providers/all`
- `go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestConfig|TestTenki|TestProviderFlag|TestProviders|TestValidateActionsRunnerCapability|TestExplicitProviderImagesSurvivePortableOSDefaults|TestSSHArgsIncludeCertificateFile|TestSSHControlPathIsScopedByProxyAndCertificate'`
- `go test ./...`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `go vet ./...`
- `go build -trimpath -o /tmp/crabbox-tenki-ready ./cmd/crabbox`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `node --test scripts/*.test.js`
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker`
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `git diff --check`

## Live Tenki Evidence

Tenki CLI was installed locally and authenticated.

Doctor:

```text
ok      provider provider=tenki timeout=10s auth=ready control_plane=ready inventory=ready api=list mutation=false leases=0 runtime=unchecked
```

Warmup:

```text
provisioning provider=tenki lease=cbx_ed8e7de22b51 slug=tenki-pr-smoke-fixed-20260607 session=crabbox-tenki-pr-smoke-fixed-20260607-971e6225 keep=true
provisioned lease=cbx_ed8e7de22b51 tenki_session=019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952 state=ready
leased cbx_ed8e7de22b51 slug=tenki-pr-smoke-fixed-20260607 provider=tenki server=019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952 type=sandbox idle_timeout=10m0s
ready ssh=tenki@sandbox:22 network=public workroot=/home/tenki/crabbox
warmup complete total=5.879s
```

Status/list metadata check:

```text
status --wait --json reported state=ready idleTimeout=10m0s ttl_secs=1800 server_type=sandbox
list --json reported the same Tenki session and preserved ttl_secs=1800 / idle_timeout_secs=600
```

No-sync run:

```text
running on sandbox echo crabbox-tenki-ok
crabbox-tenki-ok
command complete in 2.612s total=3.14s
```

Normal sync/run:

```text
syncing /Users/aakashtewari/souce-code/luxor/crabbox -> sandbox:/home/tenki/crabbox/cbx_ed8e7de22b51/crabbox
sync candidate: 622 files, 7.8 MiB dirty_delta=180 files, 3.8 MiB
sync complete in 7.986s
/home/tenki/crabbox/cbx_ed8e7de22b51/crabbox
Linux
git version 2.43.0
Python 3.12.3
command complete in 1.485s total=10.084s
```

SSH command path:

```text
crabbox ssh --provider tenki --id cbx_ed8e7de22b51 -- echo ssh-command-ok
```

This printed an OpenSSH command using:

```text
-i /Users/aakashtewari/.config/tenki/ssh/id_ed25519
CertificateFile=/Users/aakashtewari/.config/tenki/ssh-certs/019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952/...-cert.pub
ProxyCommand=/Users/aakashtewari/.local/bin/tenki sandbox ssh-proxy --session 019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952 --gateway wss://sandbox-edge-prod-2991336.sb.tenki.sh/v1/ssh/019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952
```

Stop/final inventory:

```text
released lease=cbx_ed8e7de22b51 tenki_session=019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952
deleted lease=cbx_ed8e7de22b51 server=019ea399-39cc-79a9-bdb3-1298f028b952 name=crabbox-tenki-pr-smoke-fixed-20260607-971e6225
list --provider tenki --json
[]
```
target.author: aki-luxor
